nodes.name: Route QC Review Metadata or Publish
Load Current Final Master and QC Context

parameters.query:
WITH guard AS MATERIALIZED(SELECT pg_advisory_xact_lock(hashtextextended($2::text,0))),
existing AS MATERIALIZED(SELECT q.* FROM drama.qc_jobs q CROSS JOIN guard WHERE q.idempotency_key=$2 FOR UPDATE OF q),
ins AS MATERIALIZED(
  INSERT INTO drama.qc_jobs(qc_job_id,idempotency_key,trace_id,project_id,episode_id,master_id,master_content_hash,qc_config_version,qc_type,status,started_at)
  SELECT $1,$2,$3,$4,$5,$6,$7,$8,$9,'processing',now() WHERE NOT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM existing)
  ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING RETURNING *
),retry AS MATERIALIZED(
  UPDATE drama.qc_jobs q SET status='processing',trace_id=$3,started_at=now(),completed_at=NULL,error_code=NULL,error_message=NULL
   FROM existing e WHERE q.id=e.id AND e.status IN('failed','timeout') AND $10 IN('retry','resume','regenerate')
  RETURNING q.*
),chosen AS(
  SELECT 'execute'::text decision,to_jsonb(i) job FROM ins i
  UNION ALL SELECT 'execute',to_jsonb(x) FROM retry x
  UNION ALL SELECT CASE WHEN e.status='succeeded' THEN 'cached' WHEN e.status IN('pending','claimed','processing') THEN 'running' ELSE 'rejected' END,to_jsonb(e)
    FROM existing e WHERE NOT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM retry)
),rep AS(
  SELECT r.* FROM drama.qc_reports r WHERE r.master_id=$6 AND r.version=$8 ORDER BY r.created_at DESC LIMIT 1
)
SELECT COALESCE((SELECT decision FROM chosen LIMIT 1),'rejected') decision,
       COALESCE((SELECT job FROM chosen LIMIT 1),jsonb_build_object('qc_job_id',$1,'status','failed','error_code','PARTIAL_SAVE_REQUIRES_RECOVERY')) job,
       (SELECT to_jsonb(rep) FROM rep) report,$11::jsonb request;

nodes.name: Claim or Reuse QC Job Atomically
Switch Cached Running or Execute QC

parameters.jsCode: const x=$json;return[{json:{success:true,project_id:x.request.project_id,episode_id:x.request.episode_id,trace_id:x.request.trace_id,stage:'qc_review_publish',status:'qc_completed',data_ref:{entity_type:'qc_report',entity_id:x.report.qc_report_id,master_id:x.request.master.master_id,severity:x.report.severity,cached:true},metrics:{overall_score:x.report.overall_score},error:null}}];

const x=$json;return[{json:{success:true,project_id:x.request.project_id,episode_id:x.request.episode_id,trace_id:x.request.trace_id,stage:'qc_review_publish',status:'processing',data_ref:{entity_type:'qc_job',entity_id:x.job.qc_job_id,master_id:x.request.master.master_id,reused:true},metrics:{},error:null}}];

nodes.name: Prepare Technical Subtitle and Frame QC

parameters.body: ={{JSON.stringify({model:$env.QC_VISION_MODEL,messages:[{role:'user',content:[{type:'text',text:'Inspect only the supplied sampled-frame URLs. Return JSON with content_report and compliance_report; each has score 0-100 and issues [{code,severity,scope,message,entity_ids}]. Never request or return base64.'},...$json.vision_frame_urls.map(url=>({type:'image_url',image_url:{url}}))]}],temperature:0,response_format:{type:'json_object'}})}}

nodes.name: Call Optional Vision Content Compliance QC

parameters.jsCode: const b=$json;return[{json:{...b,content_report:{...b.content_report,metrics:{...(b.content_report?.metrics||{}),vision_skipped:true}},compliance_report:{...b.compliance_report,metrics:{...(b.compliance_report?.metrics||{}),vision_skipped:true}}}}];

Save QC Job Report and Review Notification

nodes.name: Record Human Final Review Without Auto Regeneration

parameters.jsCode: return[{json:$json.response}];

nodes.name: Load Approved Master for Publication Metadata
Generate 3 to 5 Titles Tags and Cover Candidates

parameters.jsCode: return[{json:$json.response}];

parameters.query:
WITH m AS MATERIALIZED(
 SELECT * FROM drama.episode_masters WHERE project_id=$1 AND episode_id=$2 AND master_type='final' AND is_current AND status='ready'
),f AS MATERIALIZED(
 SELECT x.* FROM drama.final_reviews x JOIN m ON m.master_id=x.master_id WHERE x.review_status='approved' ORDER BY x.reviewed_at DESC LIMIT 1
),target AS MATERIALIZED(
 SELECT p.* FROM drama.publication_metadata p JOIN m ON m.master_id=p.master_id WHERE p.metadata_id=$3 AND p.project_id=$1 AND p.episode_id=$2
),candidate AS(
 SELECT t.*,COALESCE(NULLIF($5::jsonb#>>'{payload,selected_title}',''),t.title) new_title,
        COALESCE(NULLIF($5::jsonb#>>'{payload,description}',''),t.description) new_description,
        CASE WHEN ($5::jsonb->'payload')?'hashtags' THEN $5::jsonb#>'{payload,hashtags}' ELSE t.hashtags END new_hashtags
 FROM target t
),saved AS(
 UPDATE drama.publication_metadata p SET review_status=$4,title=c.new_title,description=c.new_description,hashtags=c.new_hashtags,
   cover_asset_id=COALESCE(NULLIF($5::jsonb#>>'{payload,cover_asset_id}',''),p.cover_asset_id),
   cover_url=COALESCE(NULLIF($5::jsonb#>>'{payload,selected_cover_url}',''),p.cover_url),
   scheduled_at=CASE WHEN ($5::jsonb->'payload')?'scheduled_at' THEN NULLIF($5::jsonb#>>'{payload,scheduled_at}','')::timestamptz ELSE p.scheduled_at END,
   visibility=COALESCE(NULLIF($5::jsonb#>>'{payload,visibility}',''),p.visibility),
   content_declaration=CASE WHEN ($5::jsonb->'payload')?'content_declaration' THEN $5::jsonb#>'{payload,content_declaration}' ELSE p.content_declaration END,
   platform_options=CASE WHEN ($5::jsonb->'payload')?'platform_options' THEN $5::jsonb#>'{payload,platform_options}' ELSE p.platform_options END,
   reviewed_at=now(),reviewer_comment=$6
 FROM candidate c WHERE p.id=c.id AND EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM f) AND ($4='rejected' OR (NULLIF(btrim(c.new_title),'') IS NOT NULL AND NULLIF(btrim(c.new_description),'') IS NOT NULL AND jsonb_typeof(c.new_hashtags)='array' AND jsonb_array_length(c.new_hashtags)>0))
 RETURNING p.*
),p AS(
 UPDATE drama.projects SET current_stage=CASE WHEN $4='approved' THEN 'publication_metadata_approved' ELSE 'waiting_publication_metadata_review' END,status=CASE WHEN $4='approved' THEN 'preparing_publication' ELSE 'waiting_publication_metadata_review' END WHERE project_id=$1 AND EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM saved) RETURNING project_id
),n AS(
 INSERT INTO drama.workflow_notifications(notification_id,project_id,episode_id,notification_type,severity,title,message,data,status)
 SELECT 'notify_metadata_review_'||metadata_id,$1,$2,CASE WHEN $4='approved' THEN 'publication_metadata_approved' ELSE 'publication_metadata_rejected' END,CASE WHEN $4='approved' THEN 'info' ELSE 'warning' END,CASE WHEN $4='approved' THEN 'Publication metadata approved' ELSE 'Publication metadata rejected' END,CASE WHEN $4='approved' THEN 'Publication may now be submitted.' ELSE 'Only publication metadata or cover should be regenerated; the video master remains unchanged.' END,jsonb_build_object('metadata_id',metadata_id,'master_id',master_id,'review_comment',$6),'pending' FROM saved
 ON CONFLICT(notification_id) DO UPDATE SET severity=excluded.severity,title=excluded.title,message=excluded.message,data=excluded.data,status='pending',sent_at=NULL
)
SELECT jsonb_build_object('success',EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM saved),'project_id',$1,'episode_id',$2,'trace_id',$7::text,'stage','qc_review_publish','status',CASE WHEN EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM saved) THEN $4 ELSE 'failed' END,'data_ref',CASE WHEN EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM saved) THEN jsonb_build_object('entity_type','publication_metadata','entity_id',$3,'review_status',$4,'resume_instruction',CASE WHEN $4='rejected' THEN jsonb_build_object('action','resume','target_stage','publication_metadata','scope','metadata','automatic_retry_allowed',false) ELSE jsonb_build_object('action','publish','checkpoint','publication_metadata_approved') END) ELSE NULL END,'metrics',jsonb_build_object(),'error',CASE WHEN EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM saved) THEN NULL WHEN NOT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM target) THEN jsonb_build_object('code','PUBLICATION_METADATA_NOT_FOUND','message','Publication metadata does not belong to the current final master.','retryable',false) WHEN NOT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM f) THEN jsonb_build_object('code','FINAL_REVIEW_REQUIRED','message','Approved final review is required.','retryable',false) ELSE jsonb_build_object('code','PUBLICATION_METADATA_NOT_APPROVED','message','Approved metadata requires a title, description, and at least one hashtag.','retryable',false) END) response;

parameters.jsCode: return[{json:$json.response}];

const req=$('Prepare Safe Publish Dispatch').item.json,res=$json||{};if(res.success!==true)throw new Error(String(res.error?.code||'PUBLISH_UPLOAD_FAILED')+': '+String(res.error?.message||'publish adapter rejected request'));return[{json:{request:req,result:res}}];
return[{json:$json.response}];
return[{json:$json.response}];
